title: Non-record: Warmdown-Tuned Training (val_bpb=1.2987) on 1xRTX 5090
body:
## Summary
- **val_bpb: 1.2987** (int8+zlib roundtrip) on 1xRTX 5090, 1200s wallclock
- 9+ experiments testing batch size, sequence length, architecture, warmdown tuning, register tokens, and layer looping
- Key discovery: warmdown_iters=3000 is optimal -- LR warmdown produces **2.6x per-step BPB improvement**
- Register token tested (3 approaches) and ruled out
- Layer looping + wider model (Exp 9) in progress
- Total submission size: 15.8MB (under 16MB limit)

## Experiment Results

| Exp | Change | val_bpb | Key Finding |
|-----|--------|---------|-------------|
| 6 | 1200s, warmdown=600 | 1.312 | Warmdown 2.6x per-step efficiency |
| 7 | warmdown=2000 | 1.306 | Layer 3 activated |
| **8a** | **warmdown=3000** | **1.299** | **Best result** |
| 8b | warmdown=3000 + register | 1.301 | Register token doesn't help |
| 9 | Layer looping + wider | TBD | In progress |

## Test plan
- [x] Verify submission.json fields match train.log
- [x] Verify total size under 16MB limit
- [x] Verify int8+zlib roundtrip val_bpb matches

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
